query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A black and white image of a person standing indoors with their back to the camera, one arm raised and hand open. Strong backlighting from windows or glass panels behind the figure renders the body as a dark silhouette against the bright background. Furniture and interior fixtures are visible in the surrounding room, including surfaces on the left and seating near the illuminated openings.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred black and white image of a person standing indoors with their back to the camera, one arm raised and hand open. Extreme motion blur or soft focus smears the entire scene, dissolving all fine detail and surface texture into indistinct, mushy shapes. The background light is blown out into featureless white, while the figure is crushed into an opaque black silhouette devoid of visible detail. The combination of extreme blur, crushed shadows, and blown highlights creates an unsettling, oppressive atmosphere of dread.
